competitors.name: Google Metronome
weaknesses: Extremely limited features (no time signatures, subdivisions)

competitors.name: Musicca Metronome
features: Comprehensive feature set (subdivisions, time signatures, accents)
weaknesses: Tap tempo is not prominently featured on main interface
Can feel slightly complex for absolute beginners

competitors.name: BestMetronome.com
features: Advanced features like polyrhythms and odd time signatures
weaknesses: Outdated, cluttered, and visually unappealing UI

competitors.name: Metronome Online
weaknesses: Annoying full-page ads on free version

competitors.name: Seventh String Metronome
features: Precision and accuracy favored by professionals
Extremely flexible subdivision and accent programming
Can save complex setups as URLs
weaknesses: Tap tempo is hidden and not user-friendly

gaps.gap: Modern, intuitive UI with professional-grade features accessible to beginners.
gaps.implementation: Build a clean, responsive design (like Musicca) but with the advanced capabilities of BestMetronome (polyrhythms, sound customization) presented in a progressive, learnable UI. Use tooltips and a 'simple/advanced' mode toggle.

gaps.gap: Integrated practice session logging and goal tracking.
gaps.implementation: Add user accounts with the ability to log metronome practice sessions (tempo, time signature, duration). Include charts to visualize tempo progress over time and set practice goals (e.g., 'increase from 60 to 80 BPM over 2 weeks').

gaps.gap: Contextual rhythm guides and common tempo presets for genres/songs.
gaps.implementation: Create a library of common practice scenarios: 'Blues Shuffle at 120 BPM', 'Double Kick Drum Exercise', 'Bach Minuet in G common tempo'. This reduces setup time and educates users on practical application.

gaps.gap: Superior mobile-first experience with haptic/tactile feedback.
gaps.implementation: Optimize all interactions for touch. Implement optional haptic feedback on each beat (using the Vibration API) to create a physical cue, which is invaluable for practicing in noisy environments or without looking at the screen.

gaps.gap: Social/community features for teachers and students.
gaps.implementation: Allow teachers to create and share custom metronome setups (tempo maps, complex rhythms) via a link. Students can open these 'presets' directly. Could extend to a simple shared practice room where a teacher can control the metronome remotely for a student.

recommended_positioning: The modern, intelligent metronome that grows with your practice, from first tap to professional precision.
